P5.evidence: pre-commit-tsc-gate.sh greps BOTH ^innomcp-node/src/ (L5) AND ^innomcp-next/src/ (L6), running tsc --noEmit on each package independently.

summary: All 5 phases PASS formal Opus gate validation; innomcp Phase 1-5 recovery verified intact.
